docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TANG, CHUNMING ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-27-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-22-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CHUNMING TANG & DEFENDANT ALEJANDRO PENA. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: KEVIN DOUGHERTY. (D506).

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TANG, CHUNMING AS TO DEFENDANT PENA, ALEJANDRO (WHITE TRUCK DRIVER AT THE BACK) MARIO SUSTAYMRS GROUP INC, DBA SERVICE BROS TRANSPORT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-27-2016 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID FORSBLAD. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
